title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 393.1150 - Suit or claim brought, measure of damages
text:
393.1150.  Suit or claim brought, measure of damages. — For any electric plant unlawfully constructed after August 28, 2008, in any suit or claim brought by any landowner or other legal entity for monetary damages allegedly caused by the operation or existence of such electric plant, the measure of damages shall be treble the actual damages to the plaintiff's real estate proved as determined by a judge or jury, plus court costs and reasonable attorney fees.
(L. 2008 S.B. 720)
